Thank you for your interest in instituting good governance practice in Meralco
If you are aware of any violation of the following corporate governance rules, committed by any our directors, officers or employees, related to the following:
Violation of the Corporate Governance Rules
Violation of the Code of Ethics and Company Code of Employee Discipline or other similar codes
Financial Malfeasance including those relating to financial fraud and questionable accounting and auditing matters
Kindly fill out the appropriate forms (click to download) and submit to any of the CG communication channels
Meralco values your privacy.
We collect your name, address, employee number, job title/position, company/office, contact number, email address, and signature solely to facilitate action on the Violation of Corporate Governance Rules and/or Retaliation Protection report you have submitted. These are accessed by Corporate Governance Office who hold such information under strict confidentiality. These are retained while any of the involved parties is employed in Meralco and shall be disposed of accordingly thereafter.
To know more about how we protect your data, visit
Privacy
. To exercise your data subject rights, contact
cdpo@meralco.com.ph
eReport Mo Form
Anti-Retaliation Form

June 30 - July 1, 2026 - Manila (Pandacan; Paco; And Sta. Ana)
Manila
BETWEEN 11:00PM AND 11:30PM (TUE., 06/30/26) AND THEN BETWEEN 4:30AM AND 5:00AM (WED., 07/01/26) – PORTIONS OF CIRCUITS TEGEN 56B; AND STA. ANA 14VN
Portion of Beata St. from near Princess Floresca St. to Palumpong St. in Pandacan.
Portion of Palumpong St. from Beata St. to near Jesus St. in Pandacan.
Portion of Dr. M. L. Carreon St. from Pedro Gil St. to Tomas Claudio St. including Renaissance, Eden, A. Delas Alas, Amparo and Holywood Sts. in Sta. Ana.
Portion of Menandro St. from Tomas Claudio St. to and including portion of Beata, Caingin, F. Balagtas, Flerida, Adonis, Adolfo, Linceo and Kahilom II Sts. in Pandacan.
Portion of Labores Ext. St. from Caingin St. to Tomas Claudio St. including Candida, Carlos, Eusebio, Paradise and San Jose Sts. in Pandacan.
Portion of Quirino Ave. from Gonzales St. in Pandacan to and including Canonigo St. in Paco; Dapo, Ilang-Ilang and Kahilom III Sts. in Pandacan.
BETWEEN 11:00PM (TUE., 06/30/26) AND 5:00AM (WED., 07/01/26) – PORTION OF CIRCUITS TEGEN 56B; AND STA. ANA 14VN
Portion of Beata St. from Princess Floresca St. to and including L. Certeza, Lorenzo Dela Paz, Jesus Ext., Sto. Niño, Barreto, Sta. Maria, San Jose and P. Noble Sts.; Barreto Estate Subd. and Barrio Obrero in Pandacan.
Portion of Tomas Claudio St. from Beata St. to Tomas Claudio Bridge (Nagtahan Link Bridge) in Pandacan.
REASON:
Line reconstruction works along Beata and Tomas Claudio Sts. in Pandacan, Manila.
